# MESkit — The AI-Native MES
> The AI-Native MES. Open-source Manufacturing Execution System toolkit — ISA-95 aligned, agent-powered, simulation-first, MQTT-ready.

## What is MESkit
- [What is MESkit? (FAQ)](https://meskit.cloud/faq): Core definitions and product status
- [What is an AI-native MES?](https://meskit.cloud/blog/what-is-an-ai-native-mes): Category-defining explainer

## Product
- [Product](https://meskit.cloud/product): Build, Configure, Run, Monitor modes
- [Agents](https://meskit.cloud/agents): Three specialized agents sharing one typed tool layer
- [ISA-95](https://meskit.cloud/isa-95): Standards alignment and database schema mapping
- [Architecture](https://meskit.cloud/architecture): Four-layer design with tool layer rationale
- [Roadmap](https://meskit.cloud/roadmap): M1-M6 milestone timeline

## Technical
- [How agents call MES tools](https://meskit.cloud/blog/how-meskit-agents-call-mes-tools): Tool registration and call chain deep-dive
- [From simulation to MQTT](https://meskit.cloud/blog/from-simulation-to-mqtt-same-tools-different-transport): Transport transition without logic rewrites
- [ISA-95 for developers](https://meskit.cloud/blog/isa-95-for-developers): Practical mapping from standard to Postgres schema

## Key facts
- Category: AI-native open-source MES toolkit (MIT license).
- Identity: The AI-Native MES — an MES, but an Agent-Augmented one. Agents handle coordination; operators stay in command.
- Standards: ISA-95 aligned data model with 15 mapped Postgres tables.
- Tool layer: 26 Zod-validated server actions shared by UI and agents.
- Agents: Operator Assistant, Quality Analyst, Production Planner (3 agents).
- North Star: Predict machine failure and coordinate the response via three AI layers (Sentinel, Strategist, Executor) — operators stay in command.
- Roadmap: 6 milestones (M1 complete, M2 in progress, through M6 MQTT integration).
- Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Gemini API (tool-use), TypeScript.
